title: Execute-safe mock OpenAI synthesis evaluator seed hook
problem: When openai_synthesis_evaluator_status shows review_artifact_recommended, operators must manually run mock evaluate before plan JSON shows verdict. Execute-safe could optionally seed the gitignored evaluator artifact from fixture canary JSON after verify when gates are mock-only.
acceptance_criteria: Execute-safe runs mock evaluate only when review_artifact_recommended and fixture canary JSON exists or can be synthesized mock-only.
Never runs live OpenAI HTTP; never writes accepted graph tables.
Autocycle and verify mock-first defaults unchanged when hook skipped.
Unit tests cover seed path and skip path without OPENAI_API_KEY.
non_goals: Auto-promote draft tickets or edit TICKET_QUEUE.
rollback_plan: Revert execute-safe hook and tests only.
